Hon. Anthony J. Battaglia

Proposed Orders E-mail: efile_battaglia@casd.uscourts.gov
Courtroom: 4A (4th Flr)
Chambers Rm. #: Suite 4135
Telephone: (619) 557-3446
Edward J. Schwartz
United States Courthouse
221 West Broadway
San Diego, CA 92101
Chambers Rules & Procedures

  • Battaglia Civil Procedures
  • Battaglia Criminal Chambers Rules

Biography

Federal Judicial Service:
Judge, U.S. District Court for the Southern District of California Nominated by Barack Obama on January 5, 2011, to a seat vacated by M. James Lorenz. Confirmed by the Senate on March 7, 2011, and received commission on March 9, 2011.
Assumed senior status on March 31, 2021.

Education:
United States International University (now Alliant International University), B.A., 1971 California Western School of Law, J.D., 1974
